description_long: This motorcycle features a classic, retro-inspired design with a matte orange fuel tank accented by a white racing stripe and a brown, ribbed leather seat. The frame and engine are finished in black, with visible mechanical details such as the exhaust system, air filter, and engine block. Both wheels are large, with thick, rugged tires and black spoked rims, while the rear suspension is highlighted by bright red coil springs. The front of the motorcycle is equipped with a round headlight and black fork, and the handlebars are straight with brown grips matching the seat. A prominent white number plate with the number '19' is mounted on the side, adding a vintage racing touch. The overall build suggests a sturdy, urban-ready motorcycle suitable for city streets and casual rides.
description: A retro-style motorcycle with a matte orange tank, brown leather seat, black frame, and red rear suspension springs. It features a white number plate with '19' and rugged black wheels.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, orange tank, brown seat, black frame, and the '19' number plate on the left side.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the brown seat, red rear suspension springs, and the narrow profile of the motorcycle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the right profile, orange tank, brown seat, black frame, and the '19' number plate on the right side.
description_view_3: Front view showing the round headlight, straight handlebars with brown grips, and the front tire.
